metadata.description: Stack-agnostic AI ecosystem for Claude Code projects: hooks, commands, agents, skills.

plugins.name: claude-ecosystem-plugin
plugins.description: Hooks (session_start, stop_audit, block_no_verify), slash-commands (new_session, audit_ecosystem, extract_lesson, …), the ecosystem-auditor subagent, and skills (clean-workspace, deploy-fresh). Bundles a 3-tier memory model with ReasoningBank-format lessons and a self-improving loop.
